pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage for the gallery highlighting key exhibitions, events, special offers, and quick access to the main sections of the site. Includes a global footer with newsletter signup that is reused on all pages.
primary_functions: Present featured exhibitions, events, and special offers
Provide clear entry points to Visit, Tickets, Exhibitions, Events & Workshops, Shop, Membership, and Support sections
Offer quick links to current promotions such as special exhibition tickets
Display global newsletter signup form in the footer for email subscription with preferences

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a featured exhibition card
Click on a featured event block
Click on a featured event title
Click on a special ticket offer CTA (e.g., 'Book Saturday Special Exhibition')
Click on a homepage promo for postcards & prints

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Home'
Direct URL entry or external link to index.html

pages.name: Visit
pages.description: Central page for planning a visit, including hours, location, admission, accessibility, and an overview/filterable list of guided tours (used for the weekday morning wheelchair-accessible tour booking flow).
primary_functions: Display practical visit information such as hours, location, directions, and basic admission details
Present accessibility information, including wheelchair access and services
List guided tour options with filters for day of week (weekdays), time of day (morning), and accessibility (wheelchair accessible route)
Allow users to open a specific guided tour detail page for more information and booking

incoming_params.description: Controls which part of the Visit page is scrolled into view or emphasized. Expected values: 'hours_location', 'guided_tours', 'faq'. Used by footer shortcut links such as Hours & Location, Guided Tours, and Visitor FAQ.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a guided tour title or 'More details' button in the guided tours list

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Visit'
Footer shortcuts such as 'Hours & Location', 'Guided Tours', and 'Visitor FAQ' linking to visit.html with section URL parameters
Deep links from other content (e.g., About page) to specific sections via visit.html?section=...

pages.name: Guided Tour Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific guided tour with schedule options and booking controls, including the ability to book a weekday morning wheelchair-accessible tour for 5 visitors and send it to checkout.
primary_functions: Show full description, schedule, language options, and accessibility details for a guided tour
Allow users to select a tour date and time if applicable
Allow users to set the number of visitors and select language (e.g., English) for the tour
Provide a 'Book Tour' action that proceeds to checkout with the selected 5-person tour booking

incoming_params.description: The ID of the guided tour to display details for.
Optional. Preselects a specific tour schedule (e.g., a particular weekday morning timeslot) when arriving from the Visit page search results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Book Tour' / 'Proceed to Checkout' button after selecting number of visitors and language, which calls bookGuidedTourAndCreateOrder

access_methods.description: Accessed via tour_detail.html?tourId=... (and optionally tourScheduleId=...) from the Visit page or promotional links

pages.name: Exhibitions
pages.description: Listing page for current and upcoming exhibitions with filters (date range, admission, audience suitability) and integration with the Visit Plan. Supports creating a 3-exhibition free family visit plan within the next 7 days.
primary_functions: Display a list or grid of exhibitions with key information (title, dates, price indicator, family-friendliness)
Allow filtering by date range (start today, end in 7 days), price (free admission), and audience suitability (family-friendly / children welcome)
Allow sorting of exhibitions by start date (soonest first) and other useful criteria
Provide 'Add to Visit Plan' actions on exhibition cards to save exhibitions for later
Link to detailed exhibition pages for more information

incoming_params.description: Optional ISO date string to pre-populate the exhibitions date filter start date (e.g., today).
Optional ISO date string to pre-populate the exhibitions date filter end date (e.g., 7 days from today).
Optional comma-separated list of admission type filters (e.g., 'free'). Used to pre-filter to free exhibitions.
Optional flag to pre-filter exhibitions to family-friendly only.
Optional sort key such as 'start_date_asc' to preapply sorting like 'Start date: Soonest first'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an exhibition card title or image
Click a 'My Visit Plan' button/link from the exhibitions listing after adding exhibitions

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Exhibitions'
Direct link from homepage or other pages to exhibitions.html, optionally with pre-applied filters via URL parameters

pages.name: Exhibition Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a single exhibition with visit plan integration and ticketing handoff for relevant exhibitions.
primary_functions: Present detailed information about the exhibition including description, images, dates, and times
Indicate admission type (free or paid) and suitability (e.g., family-friendly)
Allow users to add or remove the exhibition from their Visit Plan
Provide navigation back to the exhibitions listing and relevant ticketing if applicable

incoming_params.description: The ID of the exhibition to display in detail.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Back to Exhibitions' link
Click a 'Book Tickets' button for a ticketed exhibition
Click a 'View My Visit Plan' link after adding the exhibition to the plan

access_methods.description: Accessed via exhibition_detail.html?exhibitionId=... from listing pages or promotional links

pages.name: Tickets & Admission
pages.description: Page for browsing and booking dated tickets for exhibitions and general admission. Supports booking the cheapest Saturday afternoon special exhibition ticket under a given adult price and sending the booking to checkout.
primary_functions: Provide a date picker to select specific visit dates (e.g., upcoming Saturday of the current week)
Allow filtering by exhibition type (including 'Special Exhibition'), time-of-day (e.g., Afternoon 1:005:00 PM), and maximum price per adult ticket
Allow sorting of available time slots by criteria such as 'Price: Low to High'
Display a list of available time slots matching filters, with actions to select/book a slot
Provide ticket quantity selectors (e.g., set Adult tickets to 2) for the chosen slot
Provide a 'Continue to Checkout' button that leads to the checkout page with the selected ticket booking

incoming_params.description: Optional ISO date string to preselect a visit date (e.g., upcoming Saturday).
Optional. Pre-filters ticket slots to a specific exhibition.
Optional exhibition type filter (e.g., 'special_exhibition').
Optional time-of-day filter such as 'afternoon'.
Optional maximum adult price filter (e.g., 20 for tickets under $20).
Optional sort key such as 'price_asc' (Price: Low to High).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Continue to Checkout' button after selecting ticket slot and quantities, which calls createTicketBookingAndOrder

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Tickets'
Links from exhibition pages or homepage offers into tickets.html with pre-populated filters

pages.name: Events & Workshops
pages.description: Listing page for events and workshops with date, time, and price filters. Supports finding an evening workshop on a specific date under a given ticket price.
primary_functions: Display a list of upcoming events and workshops with key details (title, date, time, price, type)
Allow filtering by specific date (e.g., May 20 of the current year), time-of-day (Evening 6:009:00 PM), and maximum price per ticket
Allow sorting of events by start time or other relevant criteria
Allow users to click an event or workshop title to open the event detail page for registration

incoming_params.description: Optional ISO date string to preselect the events date filter (e.g., May 20 of the current year).
Optional time-of-day filter such as 'evening'.
Optional maximum price per ticket (e.g., 30 for tickets up to $30).
Optional comma-separated list of event types (e.g., 'workshop').
Optional sort key (e.g., 'start_time_asc').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event or workshop title in the list

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Events & Workshops'
Links from homepage featured events to events.html with preselected date filters

pages.name: Event Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single event or workshop with an integrated registration form. Supports registering 1 adult and 1 teen with a chosen payment option (including pay at gallery on arrival).
primary_functions: Show full event/workshop information including schedule, capacity, audience, and pricing
Provide a 'Register' section with ticket quantity selectors for different attendee types (e.g., Adult, Teen)
Allow users to choose payment/booking options such as 'Pay at gallery on arrival' if available
Allow users to complete registration with a 'Complete Registration' action, showing confirmation on the same page

incoming_params.description: The ID of the event/workshop to display and register for.

access_methods.description: Accessed via event_detail.html?eventId=... from the events listing or featured event links

pages.name: Shop
pages.description: Online shop landing and category listing, including postcards and prints. Supports filtering postcards by price and rating, adding multiple items to the cart, and then viewing the cart.
primary_functions: Display shop categories such as 'Postcards & Prints' and other product groups
Within a selected category, display a product grid with images, titles, prices, and ratings
Provide filters for maximum price (e.g., $5) and customer rating (e.g., 4 stars & up)
Allow sorting by criteria such as 'Customer Rating: High to Low'
Provide 'Add to Cart' actions directly from the product grid for quick shopping
Link to individual product detail pages for more information when needed

incoming_params.description: Optional category key to preselect a shop category such as 'postcards_prints'.
Optional maximum price filter for products in the selected category.
Optional minimum average rating filter (e.g., 4 for '4 stars & up').
Optional sort key such as 'rating_desc' (Customer Rating: High to Low).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card to see details
Click a 'View Cart' button/link after adding products

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Shop'
Direct links from homepage promotions to shop.html with a preselected category

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific shop product, such as a postcard, with full description and ability to add to cart.
primary_functions: Display full product details including images, description, price, and customer rating
Allow users to select the quantity and add the product to the cart
Provide navigation back to the relevant shop category listing

incoming_params.description: The ID of the product to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Back to category' link
Click a 'View Cart' button after adding the product to the cart

access_methods.description: Accessed via product.html?productId=... from the shop grid or promotions

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart page for reviewing and adjusting items before checkout. Supports the postcard task by letting users ensure each postcard quantity is set to 1 before proceeding.
primary_functions: Show all items currently in the cart, including postcards and other products
Allow users to adjust item quantities (e.g., ensure each of the three postcards has quantity set to 1)
Allow users to remove items from the cart
Display order subtotals and totals
Provide a 'Proceed to Checkout' action that leads to the checkout page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Proceed to Checkout' button, which calls createCheckoutOrderForCart

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Cart'
Redirects to cart.html after adding items with a 'View cart' action

pages.name: Membership
pages.description: Overview and selection page for gallery membership plans with an integrated signup form. Supports finding the cheapest annual student/youth membership under a given price and sending it to checkout.
primary_functions: Display available membership plans with descriptions, prices, and benefits
Provide filters to show specific membership types (e.g., 'Student / Youth') and set a maximum annual price (e.g., $60)
Allow sorting of membership options by price (e.g., 'Price: Low to High') to find the cheapest option
Allow users to select a membership plan via 'Join' or 'Select' actions
Collect member details (full name, email) and membership start date (e.g., first day of next month)
Allow users to choose membership card delivery options (e.g., digital membership card via email)
Provide a 'Continue to Payment' action that sends the selected membership and personal details to the checkout page

incoming_params.description: Optional membership type filter (e.g., 'student_youth').
Optional maximum annual price filter (e.g., 60).
Optional sort key such as 'price_asc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Continue to Payment' button after filling the membership form, which calls startMembershipEnrollmentAndOrder

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Membership'
Footer link 'Membership' to membership.html

pages.name: Support & Donate
pages.description: Support hub for donations and other ways to support the gallery. Provides a flow to make one-time donations to specific funds such as the Artwork Conservation Fund.
primary_functions: Present different donation causes or funds, including the 'Artwork Conservation Fund'
Allow users to select a specific fund to support
Allow users to enter a donation amount (e.g., $25) and choose between one-time and recurring donations
Collect donor information such as full name and email address
Provide a payment section for credit/debit card details (card number, expiry date, CVC)
Allow users to submit the donation with a 'Submit Donation' or 'Complete Donation' action and see confirmation

incoming_params.description: Optional fund ID to preselect a specific donation fund, such as the Artwork Conservation Fund.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Support'
Footer link 'Support & Donate' to support.html

pages.name: My Visit Plan
pages.description: Page displaying exhibitions saved to the user's visit plan with options to manage or review them when planning family visits.
primary_functions: Display all exhibitions (and optionally tours/events) that the user has added to their Visit Plan
Allow users to remove exhibitions or adjust their plan as needed
Provide options to print or save the Visit Plan for offline use
Provide navigation back to the Exhibitions page for adding more items

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an exhibition in the Visit Plan to see full details
Click a 'Browse more exhibitions' link

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'My Visit Plan'

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Unified checkout page for completing payments for tickets, tours, shop orders, and memberships. Receives a checkoutOrderId in the URL for each transaction and can finalize payment when required.
primary_functions: Display a summary of the current purchase or booking (e.g., 2 adult special exhibition tickets, 5-person tour, membership, or shop items)
Allow users to review and confirm booking details such as date, time, quantities, and prices
Collect billing and contact information required for payment and confirmations
Provide payment method selection and card details entry when online payment is needed (excluding donations which are handled on the Support page)
Allow users to finalize the transaction with a 'Complete Purchase' or equivalent action and show confirmation

incoming_params.description: The ID of the checkout order to display and complete payment for. Created by ticket bookings, tour bookings, cart checkout, or membership enrollment flows.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Back to Home' or 'Continue browsing' button after successful checkout

access_methods.description: Accessed via checkout.html?checkoutOrderId=... from booking, cart, or membership flows

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the art gallery, including mission, history, and key programs, with links to core sections such as Visit, Exhibitions, and Support.
primary_functions: Present the gallerys mission, vision, and history
Introduce key programs such as exhibitions, education, and community outreach
Provide links to Visit, Exhibitions, and Support pages for deeper exploration

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Plan your visit' link within the About content
Click a 'Explore current exhibitions' link
Click a 'Support the gallery' link

access_methods.description: Footer link 'About' to about.html
Direct links from external sites or campaigns to about.html

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact information and general inquiry form for the gallery, including address, phone, email, and a simple contact form.
primary_functions: Display contact details including address, phone number, and email addresses
Provide a simple contact form for general inquiries or feedback
Link users to Visit information for directions and hours

incoming_params.description: Optional subject prefill for the contact form (e.g., 'Accessibility question').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'View hours & directions' link from the Contact page

access_methods.description: Footer link 'Contact' to contact.html
Direct URL access from search engines or external sites

pages.name: Policies & Accessibility
pages.description: Consolidated page for privacy, terms of use, accessibility, and key visitor policies. Footer shortcuts link directly to specific sections via URL parameters.
primary_functions: Present the gallerys privacy policy and how user data (e.g., for donations and bookings) is handled
Present terms of use for the website and online services
Present the accessibility statement including facilities like wheelchair access and support services
Outline important visitor policies such as ticketing, refunds, and membership terms

incoming_params.description: Optional section anchor to scroll to. Expected values: 'accessibility', 'privacy', 'terms'. Used by footer links such as Accessibility, Privacy Policy, and Terms of Use.

access_methods.description: Footer links 'Accessibility', 'Privacy Policy', and 'Terms of Use' to policies.html with section parameters
Direct URL access for legal and accessibility statements

header_links.description: Plan your visit, view hours, location, and guided tours
Book dated tickets for exhibitions and general admission
See upcoming events and workshops and register to attend
Shop postcards, prints, and other gallery merchandise
Donate and learn about ways to support the gallery
View exhibitions saved to your visit plan
View and edit items in your shopping cart

footer_links.description: Learn more about the gallerys mission and background
Get in touch with the gallery
View opening hours and directions to the gallery
Learn about and book guided tours
Find answers to common visitor questions
Read the gallerys accessibility information and services
Read how your data is collected and used
Review website and service terms of use
Make a donation or support the gallery in other ways
Browse and purchase items from the gallery shop
